name: Intent
description: Intent schema from TM Forum API

allOf.description: An Intent instance is the formal description of all expectations including requirements, goals, and constraints given to a technical system

isBundle.description: isBundle determines whether an intent represents a single intent (false), or a bundle of intents(true).

priority.description: Can be used by intent owner to prioritize intents in an intent management system

statusChangeDate.description: A date time( DateTime). The date that the entity status changed to the current one

context.description: A string used to give a context to the intent

version.description: A field that identifies the specific version of an instance of an intent.

intentRelationship.description: A list of intents related to this intent

attachment.description: Attachments that may be of relevance to this intent, such as picture, document, media

creationDate.description: Date and time of the creation of this REST resource

lastUpdate.description: Date and time of the last update of this REST resource

lifecycleStatus.description: Used to indicate the current lifecycle status of this intent
